name: part_001
file: tmp_【3D BIRTHDAY LIVE】 Lovin' you to the point I'm 𝓒𝓡𝓐𝓩𝓨 ♡ #KoishiteruZOMBIE  【Kureiji Ollie】 [eYLNO0v7ylg]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_001.webm

scenes.description: A viewer watches videos of Ollie on their phone; she suddenly starts talking back, teasing them as they frantically try to exit the app and turn off the device.
Ollie teleports from the phone screen onto a 3D stage to begin her birthday live performance.
A transition animation shows a door opening to Ollie's room.

subtitles.original:
your startled face is so cute~
キミのびっくりした顔、ほんっとにかわいいよね〜
subtitles.english: your startled face is so cute~

subtitles.original:
Wasn't this what you were waiting for?
これって、ずっと楽しみにしてたんじゃないの〜？
subtitles.english: Wasn't this what you were waiting for?

subtitles.original:
To be able to talk to your oshi~
だって、推しと直接お話できるんだよ〜？
subtitles.english: To be able to talk to your oshi~

subtitles.original:
Hmm, why the frantic button pressing dear?
あれれ〜？なんで戻るボタンなんか何回も押してるの〜？
subtitles.english: Hmm, why the frantic button pressing dear?

subtitles.original:
Don't tell me you actually dislike this kind of interaction~
もしかして……オリーがこうやってお話するの、イヤだったのかな〜？
subtitles.english: Don't tell me you actually dislike this kind of interaction~

subtitles.original:
Aww why'd you turn off the phone?
え〜っ？なんでスマホの電源切っちゃうの〜？
subtitles.english: Aww why'd you turn off the phone?

subtitles.original:
You really don't want to talk to me huh~
キミってさ……オリーと話すの、ほんとうにイヤだったんだ〜？
subtitles.english: You really don't want to talk to me huh~

subtitles.original:
The fun is just about to begin~
これからもっと楽しくなるよ〜！
subtitles.english: The fun is just about to begin~

subtitles.original:
Darling~
ダーリン〜
subtitles.english: Darling~
